All right, welcome back guys. We are in the final video for the legacy coaching course. And now we are going to talk about masterminds. Okay, masterminds are going to be so awesome. The coaching masterminds will be held two times per year and will be designed around giving you tactical game plans that you can execute immediately to improve your business. So when you leave the mastermind, you have something that you can take back to your gym, apply and have it increase your bottom line or increase your profit or increase your functionality. Whatever the game plan for that particular mastermind is, you'll be able to put it to work right away. So there's small group, so your coaching group that you're in, workshops that are held in person where you and your fellow gym lords can learn and share best practices. Okay, so that's basically what these masterminds are. Now, there's most likely going to be other coaches and other classes and groups in attendance or at the same event doing their masterminds. So collaboration between the groups will certainly be encouraged. So if we have class A gyms, class B gyms, class C gyms, and we're all talking about, let's say retention, collaborating with each other is going to be huge because it's more best practices that we can pass around and share with each other. So coaching coordinators will help you get scheduled and make arrangements for you once you get into the coaching program. So you don't have to worry about how you have to organize all this and when you can reserve a spot and all this stuff. They will take care of all of that stuff for you guys. So all I can say is check your Facebook group for the specific details of each of the masterminds. You'll get signed up for them. You will attend. They come with Gym Legacy, which is absolutely awesome. And you'll get two of them per year where you can absolutely crush it if you apply everything that you learn at those in-person workshops.
